name: Thunder Black Fox Gaming Case
highlights: The Thunder Black Fox Gaming Case offers a stylish design with tempered glass panels and supports M-ATX and Mini-ITX motherboards
It fits high-end GPUs up to 340mm and 240mm AIO coolers, making it perfect for powerful, compact builds
description: Thunder Black Fox Gaming Case Price in Pakistan Feature Details I/O Ports USB 3.0 x 1, USB 1.1 x 2, HD Audio Left Side Panel Tempered Glass Front Panel Tempered Glass Motherboard Support M-ATX, Mini-ITX AIO Cooler Support Up to 240mm Max VGA Length 340mm Max CPU Cooler Height 160mm Case Dimensions 353mm (L) x 210mm (W) x 425mm (H)
